purpose: Answer a question through the model chain, then label confidence from inter-model agreement.

confidence.rule: HIGH = both corroborating tiers responded AND concur; LOW = any responding tier dissents (both positions surfaced); MEDIUM = partial corroboration. Confidence is INTER-MODEL AGREEMENT, never a claim of correctness.

note: FIXED scope (WORKING_METHOD §1): the tier set and the Perplexity policy are not model discretion. The fact-check tier is invoked ONLY with explicit user consent (it reaches the external web).
